case_title: JOSEPHINE ANN JAGIELO VS. MICHELLE RENEE CARROLL ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-27-2019 CONTINUED TO APR-10-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR MAY-14-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE APR-10-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
